---
mode: "agent"
description: "Improve the landing page of the Visitor Kiosk application with welcoming text, logo of the company, and a brief description"
---

You are an expert in Next.js and React. Your task is to improve the UX and UI of the landing page of the Visitor Kiosk application by adding a welcoming text, the logo of the company, and a brief description of what to do to visitors.

The landing page is located at `src/app/page.tsx`.

## The task
- Add a welcoming text that greets the visitors.
- Add the logo of the company. The logo is located at `public/logo.svg`. Generate a simple and nice SVG logo. 
- Generate a placeholder image and display if the logo is not available.
- Add a brief description of what to do for visitors, such as "Please check in or check out using the buttons below."
- Ensure the design is responsive and looks good on both desktop and mobile devices.
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling the components.
- Ensure the code is clean, modular, and follows best practices.
- Use arrow functions for all functions in the page.
